cards.title: Define the goal
cards.body: What is the single most important outcome of this meeting? Write it down before you join.

cards.title: Prepare your agenda
cards.body: List the 3 most important topics. Share the agenda with participants at least 30 minutes in advance.

cards.title: Review background material
cards.body: Read any relevant documents, previous meeting notes, or data you will need to reference.

cards.title: Prepare your questions
cards.body: Write down the key questions you want answered or decisions you need to drive.

cards.title: Set up your space
cards.body: Ensure a quiet environment, good lighting, charged device, and a stable connection. Have water nearby.

cards.title: Clear your inboxes
cards.body: Process email, messages, and notes to zero. Capture any open tasks or commitments.

cards.title: Review last week
cards.body: What did you complete? What did you not finish? What surprised you?

cards.title: Review your projects
cards.body: Go through each active project. Is there a clear next action for each one?

cards.title: Review your goals
cards.body: Are you on track for your monthly and quarterly goals? Do any priorities need to shift?

cards.title: Plan next week
cards.body: Identify your top 3 priorities for the coming week. Block time for deep work.

cards.title: Celebrate a win
cards.body: Name one thing that went well this week. Acknowledge your progress before moving on.

cards.title: Document the project status
cards.body: Write a clear summary: what is done, what is in progress, and what is not started.

cards.title: List all open tasks
cards.body: Capture every open action item with owner, deadline, and context. Leave nothing implicit.

cards.title: Share access and credentials
cards.body: Ensure the new owner has access to all tools, repositories, accounts, and documents.

cards.title: Explain key decisions
cards.body: Document the most important decisions made and the reasoning behind them.

cards.title: Introduce stakeholders
cards.body: Connect the new owner with key contacts. Provide names, roles, and communication preferences.

cards.title: Schedule a handover call
cards.body: Walk through the project together. Allow time for questions. Confirm the new owner feels confident.

cards.title: Check travel documents
cards.body: Verify passport validity, visa requirements, and any entry conditions for your destination.

cards.title: Book essentials
cards.body: Confirm flights, accommodation, and any required transfers or car rentals are booked and saved offline.

cards.title: Pack smart
cards.body: Use a packing list. Lay out everything before packing. Check the weather forecast for your destination.

cards.title: Prepare your devices
cards.body: Charge all devices. Download offline maps, tickets, and entertainment. Enable roaming or get a local SIM.

cards.title: Secure your home
cards.body: Lock windows and doors. Set timers for lights. Arrange for mail, plants, or pets if needed.

cards.title: Share your itinerary
cards.body: Send your travel plan to a trusted contact. Include hotel address, flight numbers, and emergency contacts.
